full_text:
Princess of Qinghe 清河公主曹氏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Princess of Qinghe (清河公主曹氏)was born in Pei. Wife of Xiahou Mao, she slandered him after he took dancing girls with him to Chang’an. Princess of Qinghe was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
